chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Suit No. 33 of 2007 Date Order with Signature of Judge For examination of parties/settlement of issues 16.05.2023 Mr.Muhammad Zahid Khan, Advocate for Plaintiff ---------- On the last date of hearing, Counsel for the Plaintiff informed this Court that he has lost contact with the Plaintiff. Today he submits a Statement dated 16.05.2023, which is taken on record, wherein he submits that this case may be consigned to record as disposed off. The Court has examined Vakalatnama filed by the Counsel for the Plaintiff and confirms Counsel authority to withdraw the suit. Accordingly, office is directed to consign this case to record as disposed off. J U D G E Ashraf
